additional_rules.name: livedata-in-viewmodel
additional_rules.message: LiveData in ViewModel — use MutableStateFlow / StateFlow instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace MutableLiveData<T> with MutableStateFlow<T> and expose as StateFlow<T> via .asStateFlow(). Collect in Composable with collectAsStateWithLifecycle().

additional_rules.name: mutable-state-in-composable
additional_rules.message: mutableStateOf() used in Composable file — state should be hoisted to ViewModel; use remember { mutableStateOf() } only for local UI state (focus, expand/collapse)
additional_rules.fix_hint: Move meaningful state to ViewModel as MutableStateFlow. If this is local UI state (e.g., dropdown expanded), wrap in remember { mutableStateOf(false) } and document why it's not in ViewModel.

additional_rules.name: side-effect-in-composition
additional_rules.message: Coroutine launched directly in Composable file — use LaunchedEffect, rememberCoroutineScope, or handle in ViewModel
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace direct launch in composable scope with LaunchedEffect(key) { } for lifecycle-tied effects, or rememberCoroutineScope().launch { } for user-triggered actions. Fire-and-forget logic belongs in ViewModel.

additional_rules.name: repository-in-composable
additional_rules.message: Repository instantiated or injected directly in Composable file — repositories must only be accessed from ViewModel
additional_rules.fix_hint: Inject the repository into the ViewModel via Hilt (@HiltViewModel + @Inject constructor). The Composable should only interact with the ViewModel.

additional_rules.name: lazy-list-missing-key
additional_rules.message: LazyColumn/LazyRow items() call appears to be missing a key parameter — this causes unnecessary recompositions
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add a stable key: items(items, key = { it.id }) { item -> ... }. The key must be stable and unique per item.

additional_rules.name: image-missing-content-description
additional_rules.message: Image composable has null contentDescription — provide a meaningful description or explicit null only for decorative images
additional_rules.fix_hint: Set contentDescription to a descriptive string for informative images, or set it to null with a comment explaining it is purely decorative.
